name: A world in the post-apocalyptic universe of Dmitry Glukhovsky's «Metro 2033»
description: The world of Metro 2033 is a post-apocalyptic Russia where the survivors of a nuclear war have taken refuge in the Moscow Metro. The surface of the Earth has been contaminated by radiation and there is an eternal winter inhabited by mutants. The subway has become the last refuge of humanity, where every day is a struggle for survival.
creator: Kaufman15
